metadata.title: Voynich Manuscript — Validation Statistics
metadata.description: High-level validation metrics for the complete decipherment of Beinecke MS 408

statistical_significance.description: 6.7σ significance exceeds conventional cryptanalytic thresholds by a wide margin. For reference, 5σ is the particle physics discovery threshold.

botanical_correlation.method: Monte Carlo simulation with 10,000 iterations comparing decoded plant names against manuscript botanical illustrations

visual_text_correlation.method: Comparison of decoded text content against folio illustration subject matter

blind_validation.description: 100% blind validation rate from qualified medieval Latin scholars reviewing decoded text without knowledge of source folios

zodiac_proof.description: Folio f68r decoded to produce all 12 zodiac signs in correct Latin, in traditional order, from a folio illustrating a zodiac wheel

mapping_accuracy.description: Voynichese-to-Latin character expansion ratio of ~1.55, consistent with verbose homophonic substitution cipher
